theme_and_archetype.description: A dense, professional, high-contrast dark UI that mirrors desktop CAD applications like OrcaSlicer and FreeCAD. Functional, tool-rich, utilizing structural slates with vibrant indicators for additive (positive) and subtractive (negative) operations.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use technical, precise fonts suitable for high-density tools.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High-density 'Control Room' grid. Efficient use of space, minimal padding on panels to maximize 3D viewport.

workspace_grid.top_toolbar: h-12 border-b border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 flex items-center px-4
workspace_grid.bottom_status: h-8 border-t border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 flex items-center px-4 text-xs

buttons.toolbar_icon: h-8 w-8 rounded text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
buttons.primary_action: h-8 px-4 bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded transition-colors
buttons.secondary_action: h-8 px-4 bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded transition-colors border border-slate-600
buttons.slice_button: w-full h-10 bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white font-bold rounded-md shadow-md transition-all uppercase tracking-wide

inputs.number_input: h-8 w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-700 rounded text-sm text-white px-2 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500 outline-none font-mono
inputs.select: h-8 w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-700 rounded text-sm text-white px-2 focus:border-orange-500 outline-none
inputs.slider: w-full h-1.5 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-orange-500

panels.header: h-10 flex items-center px-3 border-b border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/50
panels.section: border-b border-slate-800 p-3 flex flex-col gap-3

tree_view.row: flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1.5 rounded hover:bg-slate-800 cursor-pointer text-sm text-slate-300
tree_view.row_active: flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1.5 rounded bg-slate-800 border-l-2 border-orange-500 text-white font-medium

viewport_overlays.floating_toolbar: absolute top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-slate-900/90 backdrop-blur border border-slate-700 rounded-lg p-1 flex gap-1 shadow-xl
viewport_overlays.measurement_label: px-2 py-1 bg-black/80 text-white text-xs font-mono rounded pointer-events-none

1_workspace.layout: Flex column root (h-screen). Top header/menu (h-12). Main content area (flex-1 flex row). Inside main: Left Sidebar (Primitives, Outliner), Center Viewport (Three.js), Right Sidebar (Transform Inspector, Slicer Settings). Bottom Status Bar (h-8).

2_public_gallery.layout: Standard website layout. Fixed top nav. Main container with max-w-7xl, pt-24 pb-12 px-6. 'Bento' or CSS Grid for 3D thumbnail cards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6).

3_welcome_modal.layout: Centered dialog on top of the blurred workspace. Options to Start New Project, Open Local File, or Browse Gallery.

gallery_placeholders.description: Black and blue abstract background with squares and rectangles
Brown cardboard box with yellow light

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-three-fiber and @react-three/drei for the 3D viewport.
Implement the layout precisely with the defined spacing and technical fonts.
Ensure the application occupies 100vh with no global scrollbar, acting as a desktop app.
Bind Three.js transform controls to the toolbar toggles.
Distinguish additive and subtractive geometry in the scene tree visually using the defined positive/negative operation colors (orange vs cyan).
